title: ALLO: Allogene Therapeutics Inc Latest Stock Price, Analysis, News and Trading Ideas - StockTwits
text: StockTwits hosts active trading community discussions on ALLO stock. Recent consensus shows positive momentum following ALPHA3 trial data. Community sentiment reflects bullish outlook on clinical catalysts and competitive positioning versus autologous CAR T therapies. Traders discuss cash runway extending to Q1 2029, analyst price targets ranging from $5 to $14, and key inflection points from ALPHA3 efficacy data. Discussion includes both technical analysis and fundamental thesis around CAR T market opportunity.
